sqlMap.insert: /*DialogPledgeBiz.insertPledgeBiz*/ INSERT INTO TB_PLEDGEBIZ( PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , PLEDGE_BIZ_FG , PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL , PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , PLEDGE_INFO_ID , DEL_YN , REGI_ID , REGI_DATE , MODI_ID , MODI_DATE) VALUES (#pledgeBizId# , NVL(#upPledgeBizId#, '00000000000') , #pledgeBizFg# , #pledgeBizNm# , #pledgeBizLevel# , NVL((SELECT MAX(Z.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ) FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ Z WHERE UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = NVL(#upPledgeBizId#, '00000000000') ), 0) + 10 , #pledgeInfoId# , NVL(#delYn#, 'N') , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP , #userId# , SYSTIMESTAMP)
sqlMap.update: /*DialogPledgeBiz.updatePledgeBiz*/ UPDATE TB_PLEDGEBIZ SET PLEDGE_BIZ_FG = #pledgeBizFg# , PLEDGE_BIZ_NM = #pledgeBizNm# , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId#
